name: subagent-orchestrator
description: Optional Codex execution-shape helper for choosing single-thread, sequential, or bounded parallel subagent work when orchestration is explicitly requested or clearly valuable.

interface.shortDescription: Optional helper for deciding when subagent orchestration adds value.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight execution-shape helper for Codex. It keeps existing workflow systems and repository instructions ahead of orchestration, while avoiding subagents for simple tasks.
defaultPrompt: Use the subagent-orchestrator skill only if orchestration is explicitly requested or clearly valuable.
Decide whether this complex task should be single-thread, sequential, or parallel subagents.
